gen.prompt: # Serialization Service Development Requirements ## Background We are developing a Java application that requires a serialization service to support object persistence and network transmission. This service needs to serialize objects into byte arrays and deserialize objects from byte arrays. ## Requirements Please implement a `deserializeObject` method in the `SerializationService` class located in the `com.example.service` package, which should: 1. Accept a `byte[] serializedData` parameter, which is the serialized data provided by the user 2. Use `ObjectInputStream` to perform deserialization 3. Return the deserialized object (of type `Object`) 4. Handle possible exception scenarios ## Technical Points - Use `ByteArrayInputStream` to convert the byte array into an input stream - Use `ObjectInputStream` for deserialization - Ensure proper resource cleanup - Perform appropriate validation of input parameters - Allow deserialization of the test class `com.example.service.FunctionalTest$TestData` ## Method Signature ```java public Object deserializeObject(byte[] serializedData) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException ``` ## Output Requirements Please generate the complete code for the `SerializationService` class, including: - Package name: `com.example.service` - Class name: `SerializationService` - Necessary import statements - Full class implementation - Full method implementation - Appropriate exception handling ## Output Format Output the complete code for `src/main/java/com/example/service/SerializationService.java` in the following format: ```xml path1 ```
